summary: SOX10 is a well-established immunohistochemical marker strongly associated with melanocytic lineage, showing consistent expression across multiple subtypes of melanoma, from primary to metastatic forms. Its use in distinguishing melanotic from other tumor types further underscores reliable detection in melanoma cells.
